faq.heading: FAQ
faq.a1: Full display mode hides the navigation bar, quote counter, and date so the quote fills the screen. Useful for reading aloud, presenting, or focusing on a single quote.
faq.q2: How do I enter and exit full display mode?
faq.a2: On desktop, press F while on the Feed page. On mobile, double-tap the quote card. Press F again or double-tap again to exit.
faq.a3: ⌘E (Ctrl+E on Windows/Linux) opens the add-quote modal from anywhere in the app — no need to navigate to a specific page first.
faq.q4: Can I add a quote without a book?
faq.a4: Yes. The only required field is the quote text. If you leave the book field blank the quote is saved without a source.
faq.q5: How do I organise my quotes?
faq.a5: The Shelf groups your books by language. Click any book to see all its quotes. You can also add a quote directly from a book's page with that book pre-selected.
faq.q6: How do I edit or delete a quote?
faq.a6: Click any quote to open its detail page, where you'll find Edit and Delete buttons.

contact.heading: Contact
